# Rayforce

Rayforce is an embeddable columnar analytics and graph traversal engine written in pure C with zero external dependencies. It combines morsel-driven vectorized execution, a multi-pass query optimizer, and a native CSR graph engine in a single pipeline. Rayforce is queried through the Rayfall language, exposes a C API for embedding, and targets Linux, macOS, and Windows (WSL) environments.

License: MIT. Author: Anton Kundenko. Source: https://github.com/RayforceDB/rayforce

## Getting Started

- [Quick Start](https://rayforcedb.com/docs/getting-started/quick-start/): Build from source, start the REPL, create a table, and run a first query.
- [Tutorial](https://rayforcedb.com/docs/getting-started/tutorial/): Guided walkthrough of core capabilities.
- [Analytics Tutorial](https://rayforcedb.com/docs/tutorials/analytics/)
- [Graph Tutorial](https://rayforcedb.com/docs/tutorials/graph/)
- [Datalog Tutorial](https://rayforcedb.com/docs/tutorials/datalog/)
- [Storage Tutorial](https://rayforcedb.com/docs/tutorials/storage/)

## Rayfall Language

- [Syntax](https://rayforcedb.com/docs/language/syntax/): Functional query language with S-expression syntax.
- [Functions Reference](https://rayforcedb.com/docs/language/functions/): All built-in functions.
- [Math Operations](https://rayforcedb.com/docs/language/math/)
- [String Operations](https://rayforcedb.com/docs/language/string/)
- [Control Flow](https://rayforcedb.com/docs/language/control-flow/)
- [REPL Reference](https://rayforcedb.com/docs/language/repl/)
- [All Functions Reference](https://rayforcedb.com/docs/reference/all-functions/)

## Namespaces

Every dotted top-level namespace has its own page listing all builtins with arity, restricted-mode flag, signature, and example.

- [Namespaces Overview](https://rayforcedb.com/docs/namespaces/)
- [.col — Column linking](https://rayforcedb.com/docs/namespaces/col/)
- [.csv — CSV I/O](https://rayforcedb.com/docs/namespaces/csv/)
- [.db — Tables on disk](https://rayforcedb.com/docs/namespaces/db/)
- [.graph — Graph algorithms](https://rayforcedb.com/docs/namespaces/graph/)
- [.idx — Indexes](https://rayforcedb.com/docs/namespaces/idx/)
- [.ipc — IPC client](https://rayforcedb.com/docs/namespaces/ipc/)
- [.log — Write-ahead log](https://rayforcedb.com/docs/namespaces/log/)
- [.os — Filesystem & env](https://rayforcedb.com/docs/namespaces/os/)
- [.repl — REPL control](https://rayforcedb.com/docs/namespaces/repl/)
- [.sys — System info](https://rayforcedb.com/docs/namespaces/sys/)
- [.time — Clock & timers](https://rayforcedb.com/docs/namespaces/time/)

## Data and Types

- [Data Types](https://rayforcedb.com/docs/data-types/)
- [Collections](https://rayforcedb.com/docs/data-types/collections/)

## Queries

- [Select Queries](https://rayforcedb.com/docs/queries/select/)
- [Joins](https://rayforcedb.com/docs/queries/joins/)
- [Linked Columns](https://rayforcedb.com/docs/queries/links/)
- [Indexes Overview](https://rayforcedb.com/docs/queries/indexes-overview/)
- [Accelerator Indexes](https://rayforcedb.com/docs/queries/indexes/)
- [Pivot](https://rayforcedb.com/docs/queries/pivot/)
- [Vector Search](https://rayforcedb.com/docs/graph/vector-search/)

## Storage and IPC

- [Columnar Storage](https://rayforcedb.com/docs/storage/)
- [IPC and Serialization](https://rayforcedb.com/docs/storage/ipc/)
- [IPC Connection Hooks](https://rayforcedb.com/docs/storage/ipc-hooks/)

## Graph Engine

- [Graph Storage](https://rayforcedb.com/docs/graph/storage/)
- [Graph Algorithms](https://rayforcedb.com/docs/graph/algorithms/): BFS, DFS, Dijkstra, A*, PageRank, Louvain, betweenness, worst-case optimal joins.

## Architecture

- [Pipeline and Optimizer](https://rayforcedb.com/docs/architecture/pipeline/): Three-phase pipeline — DAG construction, multi-pass optimization, morsel-driven execution.
- [Memory Model](https://rayforcedb.com/docs/architecture/memory/): Custom buddy allocator with slab caches, per-thread heaps, zero-malloc query execution.
- [Block Offloading](https://rayforcedb.com/docs/architecture/offloading/)

## C API

- [Core API](https://rayforcedb.com/docs/c-api/core/): Embed Rayforce in C applications via the single header `rayforce.h`.
- [DAG API](https://rayforcedb.com/docs/c-api/dag/): Programmatic query graph construction.

- [Analytics Guide](https://rayforcedb.com/docs/guides/analytics/)
- [Datalog Guide](https://rayforcedb.com/docs/guides/datalog/)
- [Datalog Reference](https://rayforcedb.com/docs/guides/datalog-reference/)
- [Storage Guide](https://rayforcedb.com/docs/guides/storage/)
- [IPC Guide](https://rayforcedb.com/docs/guides/ipc/)
- [Error Handling](https://rayforcedb.com/docs/guides/errors/)
- [Memory and Monitoring](https://rayforcedb.com/docs/guides/memory/)
- [Type Casting](https://rayforcedb.com/docs/guides/types/)
